name: componentsv2bridge
author: Taako
description: A standalone Discord Components V2 builder with native JSON/YAML commands and a full visual Red-Web-Dashboard editor, live preview, import/export, and channel sender.
install_msg: ComponentsV2Builder loaded. Use `[p]cv2 json`, `[p]cv2 yaml`, or `[p]cv2 dashboard` to open the visual builder. Red 3.5.21 or newer is required.
short: Build, preview, import, export, send, edit, and download Discord Components V2 messages.
end_user_data_statement: This cog does not persistently store user data. Message layouts are parsed on demand and sent directly to Discord.
